surface.why_relevant: Still the primary behavioral and structural hotspot, but no longer a monolith. Analysis must now account for authority moving out of core into dedicated crates.
analysis_implications: Treat core as the primary blast-radius anchor, but track boundaries that moved into codex-login and codex-features.
Bias summaries toward remote execution normalization, plugin lifecycle movement, and guardian/exec hardening.
recent_signals: Local/remote/handler execution split is being standardized.
Full-buffer exec capture policy was added.
Guardian follow-up and prior-review reuse behavior changed.

commit_subjects: fix: case where agent is already closed (#15163)
feat: add graph representation of agent network (#15056)
Add thread/shellCommand to app server API surface (#14988)
Forward session and turn headers to MCP HTTP requests (#15011)
feat(core, tracing): create turn spans over websockets (#14632)
